历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9253 → 8908 → 8194 → 8791 → 9716, showing significant fluctuations over the past five years. After reaching a low of 8194 in 2023, it rebounded to 9716 in 2025, moving back about 925 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear backward trend. Enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 62 → 63 → 63 → 62 → 65, basically stable in the 62–65 range. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 84, an expansion of about 29.2% compared to 2025, notably increasing admission slots, which helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science Main List has been steadily rising: 2021: 30th → 2022: 29th → 2023: 30th → 2024: 27th → 2025: 25th → 2026: 24th, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was clearly negative, mainly due to poor admission communication and unreasonable major settings, causing a sharp drop of about 500 places in the admission cutoff line. On Douyin, it ranks 13th in overall popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive popularity of about 3.87 million, and cafeteria food content is widely spread, indicating high application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 7 A- or above disciplines: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grass Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, with top-tier strength in agriculture and forestry disciplines, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Engineering fields such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended in society. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, not a local university.

[Prediction Conclusion] Considering the backward trend in historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+29.2%), and the substantial increase in Physics Category examinees (+19.7%), the supply-demand offset shows that the expansion rate is greater than the examinee growth rate. However, factors such as the continuously rising school ranking, high Douyin attention, and the fading impact of the 2024 negative reputation still support competition. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 11,470, with a range of 10,970–11,970.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 952 → 882 → 976 → 1077 → 1880. From 2021 to 2024, it remained stable in the 880–1080 range. In 2025, due to disciplinary reform (Liberal Arts → History Category) and a significant increase in enrollment plan, the ranking dropped sharply to 1880, moving back about 803 places compared to 2024. From 2021 to 2024, the Liberal Arts plan was 8–9 students each year; in 2025, the History Category plan increased to 19 students (doubled), and the 2026 plan is 20 students, a slight expansion of about 5.3% compared to 2025, with limited expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking drop in 2025 due to expansion, the supply-demand imbalance in 2026 with only a slight expansion in plan (+5.3%) but a large increase in History Category examinees (+17.0%), as well as the university's rising ranking and high Douyin attention, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to slightly drop from the 2025 level of 1880. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1969, with a range of 1674–2264.
